name: Black Tourmaline
optical_properties: Uniaxial (−); strongly pleochroic (very dark brown to black); vitreous lustre; opaque to subtranslucent

electromagnetic.ir_absorption_profile: Absorption bands characteristic of BO₃ triangles (~1250–1450 cm⁻¹) and Si-O-Si bridging (~1000–1100 cm⁻¹); iron content produces broad mid-IR absorption

provenance: Cross-cultural protective mineral use (sub-Saharan, Andean, Germanic folk traditions)
consciousness_affect.mechanism_hypothesis: Strong pyroelectric effect generates sustained surface charge; may interact with ambient electromagnetic environment to attenuate stray fields near the body

provenance: Vedic mineral tradition; contemporary energetic practice consensus
consciousness_affect.mechanism_hypothesis: High iron content and dense trigonal lattice produce strong diamagnetic response; possible biofield grounding via magnetic field interaction

quantum_bridge.vibronic_coherence_mode: Pyroelectric surface charge modulation; temperature-driven polarisation shifts align with Emrys thermal cycling protocol in L2 bridge; BTS-adjacent in polarisation mechanism

gaianite_relation: Primary protective node crystal in Gaianite boundary grids (C67); used to define the outer perimeter of Gaianite field architectures
notes: The most widely cross-culturally attested protective crystal. High piezoelectric + pyroelectric coefficient makes this the Operator node's primary tool crystal. Transition guardian: Initiation→Allegiance. Seed set anchor for falsifiable prediction CDB-04.
